name: twitter-query
description: Query X/Twitter by account (user timeline) or keyword (advanced search) via twitterapi.io. Returns JSON. Requires user-supplied TWITTER_API_KEY. No LLM, no trend scoring.
author: Alex Wang

externalServices.name: twitterapi.io
externalServices.purpose: Read-only Twitter/X data: user last tweets and advanced tweet search (third-party API; user provides own API key).
